drug.name: Warfarin
drug.description: An anticoagulant drug used in the prevention of thrombosis.
drug.mechanism-of-action: Warfarin competitively inhibits the vitamin K epoxide reductase complex 1 (VKORC1), an essential enzyme for activating the vitamin K available in the body.

drug-interaction.name: Acetaminophen
drug-interaction.description: Acetaminophen may increase the anticoagulant activities of Warfarin.

drug.name: Acetaminophen
drug.mechanism-of-action: Acetaminophen exerts its effects through inhibition of the cyclooxygenase (COX) pathways.

drug-interaction.name: Warfarin
drug-interaction.description: The risk or severity of bleeding can be increased when Acetaminophen is combined with Warfarin.
